translatedLyrics:
[00:27] The ones who were once timid became poets
[00:32] Now what all must they do in love
[00:37] Those who once said nothing, lost in thoughts
[00:42] What new words these lovers now choose
[00:47] In your love blessings have been found
[00:52] I too have presented my words
[00:55] I have written something about you
[00:58] You seem like a rose
[01:02] Yes you truly seem like a rose
[01:07] Blooming in the garden of my heart
[01:10] Spreading through the breeze everywhere
[01:17] Truly I am your servant in love
[01:22] Yes I belong only to you
[01:27] O ruler of my heart, in your game
[01:30] If only you wish
[01:36] How can I become the boat of drowning hearts
[01:40] When I myself cannot swim in your eyes
[01:45] A poet’s nature is to drown in emotions
[01:50] How could I fight these storms
[01:55] In your love blessings have been found
[02:00] I too have presented my words
[02:03] I have written something about you
[02:06] Holding your hands within mine
[02:10] How can I even hold them steady
[02:15] Until sleep arrives within these lines of fate
[02:20] Let our conversations continue
[02:26] Instrumental music
[02:36] Musical humming and classical notes
[03:04] Yes… yes…
[03:07] Everyone has already said everything
[03:13] What could I say that still remains unsaid
[03:22] I am neither Mirza nor Mir
[03:32] Neither a master nor a famous poet
[03:38] What new thing could I create
[03:42] But whatever I have written
[03:48] I have truly lived it
[03:57] Like this, like that, in many ways
[04:02] As if I read what lies in my heart
[04:07] And my eyes read yours too
[04:11] Should I sit in this gathering
[04:15] Or run towards you instead
[04:21] Your eyes search for admiration
[04:26] My gathering feels empty without you
[04:31] I have only become a poet
[04:34] If only you come to listen
[04:41] Perhaps I became a poet
[04:43] Only so you would come to listen

translatedLyrics:
[00:18] I kept melting away… my heart has become you
[00:27] I kept shrinking within… my thoughts have become you
[00:36] Without you, my sky would close and darken
[00:45] You are my love… forever
[00:53] I kept melting away… my heart has become you
[01:02] I kept shrinking within… my thoughts have become you
[01:15] BGM
[01:49] Is it the sound of a harp?
[01:58] Or is it a moment where honey speaks?
[02:08] Is it like sweet milk…
[02:12] Or your gentle footsteps…
[02:16] Or the soft sound of your anklet as you walk?
[02:24] Like the melting white foam of the shore telling stories in words
[02:33] In the curve of your eyes, love shines in rainbow colors
[02:42] Without you, my sky would close
[02:51] You are my love
[02:55] Forever
[03:00] I kept melting away… my heart has become you
[03:09] I kept shrinking within… my thoughts have become you
[03:18] I kept melting away… my heart has become you
[03:26] I kept shrinking within… my thoughts have become you

originalLyrics:
[00:02] I found a love for me
[00:10] Oh, darling, just dive right in and follow my lead
[00:17] Well, I found a girl, beautiful and sweet
[00:25] Oh, I never knew you were the someone waitin' for me
[00:32] 'Cause we were just kids when we fell in love
[00:36] not knowin' what it was
[00:40] I will not give you up this time
[00:48] Oh, darling, just kiss me slow
[00:51] your heart is all I own
[00:56] And in your eyes, you're holding mine
[01:02] Baby, I'm dancin' in the dark with you between my arms
[01:13] Barefoot on the grass while listenin' to our favourite song
[01:20] When you said you looked a mess
[01:24] I whispered underneath my breath
[01:28] But you heard it, Darling, you look perfect tonight
[01:40] Well, I found a woman, stronger than anyone I know
[01:48] She shares my dreams, I hope that someday, I'll share her home
[01:55] I found a love to carry more than just my secrets
[02:04] To carry love, to carry children of our own
[02:10] We are still kids, but we're so in love, fightin' against all odds
[02:19] I know we'll be alright this time
[02:26] Darling, just hold my hand, be my girl, I'll be your man
[02:34] I see my future in your eyes
[02:40] Oh, baby, I'm dancin' in the dark
[02:47] with you between my arms
[02:52] Barefoot on the grass while listenin' to our favourite song
[02:59] When I saw you in that dress, lookin' so beautiful
[03:05] I don't deserve this, darling, you look perfect tonight
[03:13] Love
[03:24] Mm, oh
[03:26] Baby, I'm dancin' in the dark
[03:33] with you between my arms
[03:37] Barefoot on the grass
[03:41] while listenin' to our favourite song
[03:44] I have faith in what I see
[03:48] now I know I have met, An angel in person
[03:55] and she looks perfect
[03:58] Though I don't deserve this
[04:02] you look perfect tonight
